programme.title: Dying on the Edge
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the owners of a Hollywood sound studio try to capitalize on the music business and get in over their heads with moneylenders. Starring John Heard, Jasmine Guy and Tony Crane

programme.title: Executive Power
programme.desc: While protecting the U.S. President, Secret Service agent Nick Sager helps him to dispose of the body of a young girl, who accidentally died during an adulterous encounter. Some time later, a few weeks before the elections, the disillusioned ex-agent is approached by his former partner. - Starring Craig Sheffer, John Heard, Joanna Cassidy

programme.title: Final Move
programme.desc: Detective Nick Mathers loses everything in the pursuit of a killer: his wife, his eldest daughter, his girlfriend. Worse follows when the case that cost his daughter's life resurfaces, the Chess Piece Killer wants to finish the game.

programme.title: Elizabeth Blue
programme.desc: Anna Schafer plays Elizabeth, a young woman struggling with schizophrenia. With the help of her Psychiatrist (Screen Actors Guild Award Winner Adewale Akinnuoye-Agbaje) Elizabeth is doing her best to navigate voices, hallucinations, anxiety, failing medications and her unsupportive mother .

programme.title: End Call
programme.desc: The Devil has a phone number, and if you call him on your mobile phone at midnight, he will grant your wish. In return however, he will control your life for the duration of the call.

programme.title: Fever
programme.desc: Damien and Pierre, two high school students, murder an unknown woman previously spotted on the street

programme.title: Fear Love and Agoraphobia
programme.desc: An agoraphobic man and a female Marine become emotionally entangled as they struggle to escape from their personal prisons.

programme.title: Father's Chair
programme.desc: A man who has put his career ahead of everything else in life learns the value of family when his son goes missing.

programme.title: Ever After Reloaded
programme.desc: A young, straight laced police detective, Jack Carrouseau, inadvertently crosses paths with a mysterious assassin named Miko. Despite requests to end the pursuit, he continues to investigate, and uncovers a trail of blood and death stretching from the beaches of Southern California to the inner boroughs of Washington DC.

programme.title: Empire of Dirt
programme.desc: Going home was never an option for single mother Lena Mahikan (Cara Gee). But when her 13-year-old, Peeka (Shay Eyre) overdoses in the streets of Toronto, she is forced to return home to her estranged mother and face a life-long legacy of shame and resentment.

programme.title: EM3
programme.desc: Drugs and grand theft auto, Raul lives his life on the edge. Faced with the painful choice between love and riches, Raul makes a shocking choice, blinded by the nightclub lights. A thrilling first-person view through the eyes of a drug dealer.

programme.title: Soren
programme.desc: Exploration of love and relationships in contemporary Bolivia.

programme.title: Soren
programme.desc: Exploration of love and relationships in contemporary Bolivia.

programme.title: Secrets In The Fall
programme.desc: Nothing is impossible for a group of young campers, friends and enemies alike, on a weekend retreat at Camp Pinnacle. But what starts as an exciting wilderness adventure turns into trouble when a young camper goes missing and the rest of the group must set out to find him.

programme.title: Revenge Of The Samurai Cop
programme.desc: A cop comes out of hiding to avenge the death of his wife and must take on a banished warlord who may be his wife's killer. With Tommy Wiseau (The Room)

programme.title: Smokers
programme.desc: A group of troubled teenage girls enact revenge on the boys who mistreated them in this biting dark comedy. The stunning clique of girls couple their togetherness with smoking only to be taunted by those more popular than them.

programme.title: Sons of Liberty
programme.desc: An elite team of scientists and soldiers unite to thwart a terrorist plot to detonate a nuclear weapon along the Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Snowflake
programme.desc: Hunting down the murderer of their families in an anarchic Berlin of the near future, the outlaws Tan and Javid find themselves trapped in the wicked fairytale of a mysterious screenplay that entangles them in a vicious circle of revenge - apparently all written by a clueless dentist. **Subtitled**

programme.title: Tail Sting
programme.desc: A pack of massive genetically altered Scorpions escape containment on an airplane, turning passengers into victims and forcing one ordinary woman to confront her worst fears.

programme.title: Slaughter is the Best Medicine
programme.desc: A handpicked team of British commandoes take on a simple mission: Extract the mysterious Professor Black from his hiding place in Gallows Woods and bring him back alive.

programme.title: Costa Magica
programme.desc: Pristine waters, exotic ports of call and unique, once-in-a-lifetime activities await you on Dream Cruises. Sail away with us on state of the art vessels fit for adventure on the seas.

programme.title: Mexico & the Eastern Orient-Express
programme.desc: Travel to award winning Maroma Beach in Riviera Maya, Mexico. This unique beach offers luxury accommodations and powdered sands that never get hot. Next, head to Bangkok and take a ride on the Orient Express and experience luxurious cabins.

programme.title: Thorntree Lodge
programme.desc: With so much diversity, rare wildlife and stunning sights, there’s no denying Africa is the place to be! Join Amber Wyatt as she trades the beach for riverbanks and safaris, exploring the heart of Zambia. Thorntree Lodge will leave you in awe!

programme.title: Best Around the World
programme.desc: Jonathan Legg recounts his best moments from the second season, revealing insights and unseen footage.

programme.title: Search For The New Boat
programme.desc: We’re sailing away – and visiting exotic lands with ‘Distant Shores.’ Join us as we explore the waters and culture of the Middle East, the Mediterranean, and the Caribbean.

programme.title: Rwanda Pt. 1
programme.desc: Jeannie and Janez visit the genocide memorial and Hotel des Mille Collines, the hotel depicted in the movie Hotel Rwanda. They are given a glimpse of this beautiful country's painful past

programme.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5 star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programme.title: Las Vegas
programme.desc: In this episode we explore Las Vegas’ lesser known past. We visit the National Atomic Testing museum to learn about how the desert outside of Vegas was used. We also visit the Mormon Fort as well as the Neon Museum.

programme.title: Cozumel
programme.desc: In this episode, we are in Mexico, on the island of Cozumel, to discover fabulous hotels and the natural treasures that this country has to offer. Typical food, high quality tequila, scuba diving and even a pirate ship tour are on the menu!

programme.desc: Jonathan visits the Slum Dog Millionaire neighborhood of Dharavi, explores the Taj Mahal Palace, and goes on a midnight search and destroy mission.

programme.title: Tony Bennett - Duets II: The Great Performances
programme.desc: Duets II: The Great Performances is a visually stunning video companion to Tony Bennett's history-making #1 album, Duets II. The concert features the full song performances from Tony and today's greatest artists as they were recorded live in the studio. The musical segments are enhanced by insights on the process from Tony and the duet partners, providing an inside look at this landmark album in an unprecedented career. Duets II: The Great Performances is a testament to the artistry and dedication of Tony Bennett, beloved by the performers who sing with him and audiences around the world. Starring Andrea Bocelli, Michael Bublé, Natalie Cole, Sheryl Crow, Aretha Franklin, Josh Groban, Faith Hill, Norah Jones, Lady Gaga, kd lang, John Mayer, Willie Nelson, Alejandro Sanz, Queen Latifah, Carrie Underwood, Amy Winehouse.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix - Band of Gypsys Documentary
programme.desc: This Grammy Award-winning documentary features the only known concert footage of Band of Gypsys. Providing crucial insight into some of the most exciting and influential music Jimi Hendrix created, it also features interviews with Billy Cox, Buddy Miles, Mitch Mitchell, Noel Redding, Lenny Kravitz and Slash.

programme.title: James Taylor - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Leon Bridges - Live in London 2015
programme.desc: The Apple Music Festival (formerly known as the iTunes Festival) was a music concert series held by Apple, Inc. inaugurated in 2007.

programme.title: Tom Odell - Live at Irving Plaza
programme.desc: Having already conquered the UK with his chart-topping debut album ‘Long Way Down’, don’t miss Tom Odell’s dazzling live show filmed at Irving Plaza, New York City. Watch the 22-year-old English wunderkind deliver stirring hits like ‘Another Love’, as he brings his heart-wrenching album to life in gorgeous fashion.

programme.title: WALK THE MOON - Live in London 2012
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Walk the Moon performs their hits including "Shiver Shiver", "Next in Line", "Anna Sun" and many more.

programme.title: One Direction - Apple Music Festival
programme.desc: One Direction performs a stellar set at the 2015 edition of the Apple Music Festival. Be prepared to sing along to their catchy chart-topping hits!

programme.title: Ellie Goulding - Live at the iTunes Festival
programme.desc: Do not just be fascinated by the beauty and girlishness of this bright-eyed Englishwoman. Ellie Goulding has a lot more to offer fans of good pop music and its electronic variations. Since releasing her first album in 2010, Ellie has traveled the world to showcase her talents, both in the voice and in the composition of her songs. These talents can be seen in this show at the iTunes Festival in London, with special mention for the songs "Burn", "Halcyon", "Lights" and "My Blood".

programme.title: Blondie - Live in London 2014
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Blondie performs her hits including ''Heart of Glass", "Euphoria", ''Mile High" and many more…

programme.title: Alice In Chains - Alice in Chains - Unplugged
programme.desc: In their first live concert in over 2 years (and possibly their last concert ever), Alternative/metal group Alice in Chains performs acoustically at MTV Unplugged. Includes acoustic versions of the hit songs "Got Me Wrong," "Rooster," "Would?," and "Down in a Hole."

programme.title: AC/DC - Circus Krone
programme.desc: Filmed at the world famous Circus Krone in Munich, this AC/DC concert from June 17, 2003 features standout performances of "Rock N Roll Damnation" and "What's Next To The Moon" and more.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses - Live From The O2 Arena London
programme.desc: Watch this mega-production of Guns N’ Roses performing live at the O2 Arena to its fans singing and vibrating to each song. Includes; Paradise City, Sweet Child O’ Mine, November Rain and many more.

programme.title: Lady Gaga - Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on September 1, 2013 marks the superstar's first full concert since the The Born This Way Ball. It is an eight song set containing the world premiere of seven tracks from her fourth album, ARTPOP: "Aura"; "MANiCURE"; "Artpop"; "Jewels N' Drugs" ft. T.I., Too $hort and Twista; "Sexxx Dreams", "Swine"; and "I Wanna Be With You", a song that transformed into "Dope" for ARTPOP. During the concert, captured stunningly in HD, Gaga says that she's "a bit like Dorothy right now." The stage is her Kansas, the crowd is her family, and their reunion is pure magic. Lady Gaga, her dancers, and her band traverse through visual and musical themes of love, sex, violence, beauty, danger, empowerment, hustle, lust, and above all ART. Throughout, Gaga lays her heart bare for the audience and the cameras with every note sung and every word spoken.

programme.desc: When an English author learns he has an inheritance in Greece, he goes there and meets a local worker with a zest for life; forcing him to reexamine his life.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: A widow seeks help from a mysterious stranger when she learns that her husband's partners in a theft during WWII will stop at nothing to get the money.

programme.title: The Stooge
programme.desc: An obnoxious vaudeville singer attempts to ditch his goofy comic partner in an effort to find success in show business on his own.

programme.title: Blondie

programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.title: 20,000 Leagues Under the Sea

programme.title: Gone with the West

programme.title: Wildest Places S03 E04 - Coast
programme.desc: Australia has more than 35,000 kilometers of coastline. From broad, sandy beaches to towering cliffs and mangrove swamps, Australia’s coast can be a strange mix of soil and sea; rainforest and reef.

programme.title: Wildest Places S01 E01 - Bays
programme.desc: The calm azure waters of the Coral Triangle are fringed with jungle, coconut trees and mangroves. Centuries of seismic activity have lined these bays with volcanic ash and mud. Rather than smothering life, these ‘muck zones’ have borne some of the marine world’s most bizarre adaptations.

programme.title: Wildest Places S01 E02 - Reefs
programme.desc: This episode looks at the various habitats and areas of a coral reef, and how each zone within this extremely complex and delicately balanced ecosystem houses life forms that adapt in unique ways.

programme.title: Art & The City S01 E05 - London
programme.desc: David Keeps explores London’s vibrant art scene from edgy Camberwell hotels and Tate Modern bridges to royal relics and Hoxton galleries uncovering creative contrasts in a city where ancient tradition and modern expression collide with wit.

programme.title: Art & The City S01 E06 - Los Angeles
programme.desc: David Keeps explores Los Angeles’s creative energy from cutting edge Culver City galleries and Disney Hall to the Getty’s bold exhibits and Chinatown’s emerging scene revealing how art, architecture, and personality fuel this sprawling cultural capital.

programme.title: American Canvas S01 E03 - Miami
programme.desc: Dave Holmes explores Miami’s dynamic cultural scene, from the international art spectacle of Art Basel to Little Havana’s rich culinary traditions, Wynwood’s street art, quickie couture fashion, flamenco dance, and dazzling Art Deco architecture.

programme.title: Euromaxx Architecture E65 - Bright Ideas, Bold Urban Forms
programme.desc: Living With Wood The Courage to Use Color Europe’s Highest Steeple The Twist Sculpture Gallery A City Made of Cardboard Berlin's Studio karhard

programme.title: Euromaxx Architecture E66 - Sustainable Living, Timeless Design Revival
programme.desc: Eighteen Stories and Made of Wood Bauhaus-style Architecture in Pamplona Pimp My Caravan Sustainable Building: the Cork House An Island Home in Brittany Frankfurt's New Old Town

programme.title: Race Across The World S03 E04 - Episode 4 NB
programme.desc: ‘Race Across the World’ is back, as five teams attempt to race sixteen thousand kilometres through the second largest country in the world – Canada. Without smartphones, internet access and credit cards, and armed only with the cash equivalent of the airfare to fly the route, our teams travel this extraordinary journey at ground level. Their skill, ingenuity and determination will be tested to the extreme as they race through some of the world’s most remote regions, where they must also rely on the kindness of strangers in order to stand the best chance of reaching the finish line. This series takes viewers on the trip of a lifetime, following our racers as they embark on an epic and adrenaline-fueled adventure, traveling into the unknown without the trappings of modern life.

programme.title: Euromaxx On Vacation E80 - Alpine Roads, Russian Beauty, Belgian Grit
programme.desc: Through Mountains and Fjords: Norway’s Flåmsbana Belgium’s first female horseback shrimper Karelia: An Unspoiled Beauty Spot in Russia Alpine Circle - Exploring the Swiss Alps on an E-Bike Madeira: Remote working in vacationland The “Water Doctor”: Kneipp Turns 200

programme.title: Race Across The World S03 E05 - Episode 5 NB
programme.desc: The BAFTA-award winning third series of Race Across the World has reached the half-way point and our four teams are one leg closer to the £20,000 cash prize.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay’s Great Escape S01 E02 - India Part 2
programme.desc: Gordon’s got a taste for adventure and heads off the tourist track into impenetrable north-east India, home of the country’s best-kept culinary secrets. Leaving the 21st century behind, he immerses himself in the life of a local meat-loving tribe in Nagaland, once better known for head-hunting than their curries. Then he’s off to Assam to enter a housewives’ competition to find the best Assamese dish; and finally he sets up shop among the street food stalls of Calcutta to try and tempt the local foodies into buying north-east curry – Ramsay style.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S01 E09 Mushroom
programme.desc: Indulge in Lauren's exploration of the chocolate world as she uncovers its unique types and characteristics. From savory chocolate salsa to raw vegan cake, her mix of sweet and savory recipes leaves a lasting appreciation for this beloved ingredient.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S01 E10 Chocolate
programme.desc: Lauren dives into the fascinating world of mushrooms, exploring their flavors, textures, and health benefits. She shows how to make savory mushroom sausage rolls and delicious mushroom steaks, showcasing the versatility of these earthy ingredients.

programme.title: Euromaxx À La Carte E119 - Belgian Waffles, Sandwich, Yogurt, Kumpir
programme.desc: Thin and crispy: Alsatian tarte flambée. Kumpir: the secrets of Turkey’s baked potato. The Magic of Belgian Waffles. The Sandwich – Simple and Good. Bulgarian Yogurt: A Fountain of youth?

programme.title: Euromaxx À La Carte E121 - Chocolate Lover’s Dream, Stilton, Pizza
programme.desc: Kalter Hund – A chocolate lover's dream! Cheesy comestibles: Stilton from England. Round, Colorful and Sugary Sweet: Macarons. Pizza: Italy’s Classic Street Food. The Taste of Albania: A 24-hour Food Tour of Tirana.

programme.title: Lucky In Love S01 E02 - Gary and Dean in Washington D.C. NB
programme.desc: Gary and Dean explore the capital city by the toss of a coin. Their journey includes activities ranging from kayaking on the Potomac River to trying the city's best chili dogs.

programme.title: Lucky In Love S01 E03 - Rachel and Paul in New Orleans NB
programme.desc: Rachel and Paul explore The Big Easy by letting a coin toss decide their path, creating a unique way to discover the city's culture and attractions

programme.title: Beach Battles S01 E01 - Key West Wrightsville
programme.desc: Dive into the fun, blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.

programme.title: Americanos E01 - Austin, Texas
programme.desc: We explore Austin's vibrant culture through the lens of Latinx influences, focusing on its evolution from a Wild West town to a creative, tech-focused hub. In this episode, viewers explore the world of Tejanos, from Selena fandom and vaqueros (the original cowboys of Texas) to taco joints, barbeque, and the legendary independent film and music scene that spawned Austin City Limits and SXSW.

programme.title: Americanos E02 - Los Angeles, California NB
programme.desc: From Compton to Highland Park, this episode traverses Los Angeles to meet three Americanos who are carving out a place for themselves within film, food, and beauty. Distinctly drawing on their diverse backgrounds and deeply influenced by the city they live in, audiences get a better sense of how Latinx culture has permeated the streets, runway, and silver screen.

programme.title: Into Americas Wild NB
programme.desc: Narrated by Morgan Freeman, this documentary short takes viewers on a scenic, fast-paced journey through the United States' natural wonders. The film emphasizes the connection between humans and nature, exploring locations from the Alaskan wilderness to the Appalachian Trail and Utah's canyons.

programme.desc: Where else can you find a beach full of cats after shopping in a vintage vinyl store in the heart of the city or watch a shadow puppet show after having a home-cooked meal prepared by two entrepreneurs?

programme.title: On the Record with Mick Rock S01 E01 - Josh Groban in Los Angeles NB
programme.desc: Native Angeleno and multi-platinum recording artist Josh Groban takes Mick on an inspiring tour of Los Angeles, paying homage to the high school teacher who gave him the confidence to succeed, stopping by the after-school Shakespeare program he personally supports and treating Mick to a moving performance of his song, “Hidden Away.”

programme.title: On the Record with Mick Rock S01 E02 - Kings of Leon in Nashville NB
programme.desc: Mick discovers how the Grammy Award-winning rock stars, Kings of Leon, escaped their Pentecostal roots to find a home in Nashville’s evolving music scene. The band dishes on its rocky past and gives Mick a tour of country music’s hometown, ending the day in the Kings’ private studio for an exclusive jam session.

programme.title: On the Record with Mick Rock S01 E03 - The Flaming Lips in Oklahoma City NB
programme.desc: Mick touches down in Oklahoma City to hang with the Flaming Lips and uncovers how these masters of psychedelic rock have become the surprising hometown heroes. Lead singer Wayne Coyne shows off his wacky art gallery, fills Mick in on his all-night parties with Miley Cyrus and ends the day with a performance of the group’s hit song, “Do You Realize?”

programme.title: On the Record with Mick Rock S01 E04 - Patti Labelle in Philadelphia NB
programme.desc: Grammy Hall of Fame artist Patti LaBelle takes Mick on a personal tour of Philadelphia, visiting the theater that launched her career and stopping by her childhood home where she first found her voice with a broomstick microphone. After grabbing a bite at her favorite soul food spot in the City of Brotherly Love, Patti invites Mick into her living room for an intimate performance of What Can I Do For You?

programme.title: HEALTH EXPLORED S02 E01 Friluftsliv (Part 1)
programme.desc: We travel to Tromso to learn about the concept of “Open Air Life” from the inhabitants of this arctic region. Feed reindeer and take in the mountains with a Saami guide.

programme.title: Health Explored S02 E02 - Friluftsliv Pt 2
programme.desc: We go sea to summit with a skiing experience. We trek to an unskiied peak then go diving in the frozen ocean. Then we learn about sauna culture and how activity should be fun not work

programme.title: Journey Within S01 E01 - Costa Rica
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore Zunya, an eco-village, and its enchanting blue zone concept. We delve into communal living, uncovering its allure. At La Senda, we experience soul cleansing Temazcal and a sublime cacao ceremony. We engage in a farm-to-table activity, savouring locally sourced ingredients. Cala Luna offers a rejuvenating body treatment amidst serene surroundings. We encounter the Maleku Tribes, witnessing their dance ceremony and visiting their cacao farm. The journey concludes with a breath taking hike and a majestic volcano view, reminding us of nature's beauty. This episode is a transformative adventure of self-discovery, cultural immersion, and connection with nature.

programme.title: Journey Within S01 E02 - Ireland
programme.desc: Marilia's Irish journey, meeting land enthusiasts, explored scenic spots, encounters with Ellie and Hazel, vegan delights at Cornucopia, and concluded with a reflective sunset in the Wicklow Mountains, highlighting a strong community spirit.

programme.title: Chasing The Sun S01 E05 - Brazil
programme.desc: Chasing the Sun, explores Brazil's northeast, uncovering vibrant cultures, fishing traditions, and natural beauty. From Fortaleza to Jericoacoara, discover inspiring stories of resilience, community, and the unique charm of this captivating region.

programme.title: Chasing The Sun S01 E06 - Brazil
programme.desc: Chasing the Sun, explores Brazil's northeast, uncovering vibrant cultures, unique traditions, and natural wonders. From capoeira to the world's largest cashew tree, discover inspiring stories of resilience, community, and the beauty of this captivating region.

programme.title: Departures S03 E08 - Ethiopia - Saints And Snakes
programme.desc: Scott and Justin explore the spiritual side of Ethiopia. In Lalibella, they visit ancient churches carved entirely out of stone, and Justin tries teaching a class of school children some new words. They visit the castles in Gondor and the Church of Saint Mary of Zion, which claims to house the lost Ark of the Covenant. At the Debra Damos monastery, accessible only by climbing a rope up a sheer cliff, they share some difficult but hilarious conversation with a well-spirited monk, who has some poignant things to say about brotherhood and human origins.

programme.title: Departures S03 E09 - Ethiopia - Dances With Bulls
programme.desc: Scott and Justin meet up with Robel, who takes the guys to visit his sisters in his village of Harar. They visit the bustling chat market, and learn how to prepare the traditional stimulant. That night, Robel takes them to feed some wild hyenas by hand. Leaving Harar, they take a long drive to visit the Hammer Tribe. Here they witness a rare ceremony in which the women of the village offer themselves to be whipped, and one soon-to-be married man has to run, stark naked over a dozen bulls, to prove his worth as a husband.

programme.title: Departures S03 E10 - Rwanda
programme.desc: Rwanda is a country emerging from its darkest years of poaching and the 1994 genocide. Scott and Justin travel with locals to learn more about how Rwanda is managing today. They explore the recovery of the animal population – from swimming cows on Napoleon Island to trekking into the wild to visit isolated groups of mountain gorillas. This experience is contrasted with a visit to the church of Ntarama to talk to a genocide survivor, and a court tribunal of several accused men. The guys hear stories of forgiveness from the people, and learn of their hope for their country.

programme.title: Southern Uncovered with the Lee Brothers S01 E03 - Asheville, NC
programme.desc: Matt and Ted Lee forage for wild ramps, throw down some local clay with a renowned ceramic artist and sample an unexpected pairing of yoga and beer in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Southern Uncovered with the Lee Brothers S01 E04 - Louisville, KY NB
programme.desc: Matt and Ted Lee descend on Louisville, Kentucky, to brew soy sauce in bourbon barrels, explore Mayan-meets-Southern cuisine and get a new taste of the traditional Hot Brown sandwich.

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara"&". First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop "&"a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO’s World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Overland Mail
programme.desc: Two investigators for a stagecoach company are assigned to find out why the company's stages keep being ambushed. They discover that the culprits are white men disguised as Indians, and they set out to discover who is behind the plot.

programme.title: Saving Grace B Jones

programme.title: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: An anti-aging serum is being developed by a scientist. When he loses his funding he uses it on himself with dire results.

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: Holiday, a four act abduction thriller deconstruction, follows Anne as she visits Venice Beach and meets a friendly Brit, Graham. But Graham is not who he appears to be and Anne finds herself held captive in Mexico with no apparent escape.

programme.title: The Sun at Midnight
programme.desc: In this wilderness survival drama, Lia, a 16 year-old urban princess, is sent to spend the summer with her Gwich'in grandmother in a small Arctic Circle community. Desperate to return to city life she steals a boat and sets out into the vast Northern wilderness hoping to reach the nearest town. Totally lost, she is discovered by Alfred, a Gwich'in hunter who reluctantly takes her under his wing as he navigates the massive landscape in search of caribou. When Alfred is severely wounded in a bear attack Lia pushes on and fights to save both of their lives.

programme.title: Nature-Inspired Crafts: Wooden Rope Seat & Slab Wood Coffee Table
programme.desc: In the episode "Easy Projects with Native Materials," the focus is on crafting robust furniture using natural materials, bringing joy to woodworking enthusiasts. The project kicks off with a stool build using one-inch dowels for rails and sturdy legs crafted from one-and-a-half-inch square pieces. A standout feature is the woven seat, initially demonstrated with bundling twine but showcased with Cecil rope for its natural charm and durability. The construction process begins meticulously, drilling precise holes using a drill press for consistent alignment. Offset holes on adjacent faces accommodate the rails snugly, while chamfered ends prevent any interference during assembly. Dry-fitting ensures all components fit seamlessly before applying glue, guaranteeing a sturdy final product. After assembly, the stool is clamped securely to maintain square alignment and left to dry before sanding and finishing bring out the wood's natural beauty. The seat weaving process is a highlight, with the speaker demonstrating how to wrap Cecil rope around the frame in a precise pattern, creating a durable and visually appealing seat. Throughout, the importance of precision and the handy use of pliers for control during weaving are emphasized. The episode also explores comparisons between stools made from different materials, celebrating the diversity of woodworking choices. Transitioning to a coffee table project, the speaker selects wood pieces with a striking blue stain for added visual interest. Techniques for drilling and joint fitting are expertly demonstrated, ensuring the table frame is not just sturdy but also artistically crafted. Challenges encountered, such as uneven surfaces or knots in the tabletop, are met with practical solutions, including finishing tips with Danish oil for a natural, lustrous look. Throughout the tutorial, the joy of working with native materials and the satisfaction of creating beautiful, enduring furniture pieces shine through, making it a delightful watch for woodworking enthusiasts of all skill levels.

programme.title: Fit and Flare
programme.desc: A classic style sometimes can use a change whether for fashion or fit. Fit expert Kathleen Cheetham teaches how to create a back yoke on a blouse to eliminate multiple darts or change to a more casual look. Then, it's a lesson on sleeves for your Little Black Dress with Angela Wolf. Finally, Gretchen Hirsch alters a favorite pattern by adding a flounce for a fashion flare.

programme.title: T-Shirt Finishing Tips: Hems, Necklines + Weaving in Ends
programme.desc: So you’ve finished knitting your Novel-T, now what? Tune in to see how to weave in the ends when working with cotton yarn. Hint: this method involves fabric glue.

programme.title: Four Ways to Yarn Over in Pattern & Lace Knitting Demystified
programme.desc: Did you know there is more than one way to do a yarn over? Yup, there are actually four! This week Tracey and Jodi demonstrate all four techniques and talk about when to use each.

programme.title: Settings
programme.desc: We create some new locations for creative play as we change the setting around us. We start out with a tree that reflects the changing seasons. Then, we'll make a play tent for imaginary adventures. The next page of our art journal is a surreal collage from magazine cutouts. Last, we create a portable playscape of the forest.

programme.title: Sci-Fi
programme.desc: Travel to the future for new adventures. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes a metallic robot tray to hold coins and treasures. Then, she creates a mysterious sea creature. Franz Spohn launches aliens into outer space and Jenny makes futuristic sculptures from foam.

programme.title: Art Inspired Jewelry Making
programme.desc: Blogger Andrew Thornton talks about drawing inspiration from your art and turning your hobby into a business. Then, he shares one of his favorite new jewelry making techniques on making decorative end caps using epoxy clay. Katie's Beading Lesson is about using beaded chain for an easy necklace.

programme.title: The Artistic Process
programme.desc: Making art is a process that requires start to finish instructions. Tammy Honaman is up first with the basics of bead embroidery – what you need, the tools, and various finishes and shapes. Then meet Katie Baum as she takes you through a sterling ring from start to finish - learn about kilns and working in sterling.

programme.title: Different Materials
programme.desc: New materials are the spice to your scrapbook soup. Every dish needs a little dash of pepper to add some flavor. It'sthe same with scrapbooking - bland is not very interesting. Fill in the spaces of your letters with paper on the "attitudes in generosity" page, build on a core to add dimension with Stacey Caron for a cherished layout, and projects featuring paper, acetate and glass from Sara Naumann; a spicy mix today on Scrapbook Soup.

programme.title: Episode 1: Daily Activities
programme.desc: The first step in creating the make it artsy lifestyle is starting with daily activity. By reinforcing art daily, we develop a behavior and routine to being creative. Host Julie Fei Fan Balzer begins with a daily calendar, and then Jodi Ohl introduces us to her routine of coffee and watching the birds in her yard. Finally, artist Tori Weyers introduces us to a daily sketchbook practice. You can always find time for a simple artful expression.

programme.title: Milky Way
programme.desc: The Walters household is eating healthy this week, but that doesn't mean Angela's quilts have to be. Today she is whipping up the Milky Way Quilt by Monique Dillard featuring Lily & Loom fabric.

programme.desc: What happens when a rail fence meets a log cabin? Angela Walters' modern, lush batik quilt, demonstrated here!

He'll also show you how to make your own saw horses and stools to give you more real estate in the shop.

We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.

programme.desc: Explore your inner child and let them out during playtime on this episode of Fresh Quilting. Steph Skardal encourages playing with color starting with paper before even adding fabric. Then, Catherine Cureton plays around with a mini quilt to turn it into a functional pillow. Eliane Bergmann has a machine tip on presser feet - when do you raise and when do you lower – what is that knob on your machine?

programme.desc: Hollywood designers and glamorous starlets set the trends as people flocked to the movies in the 1930's. Rebecca Kemp-Brent shows how to recreate any neckline for a whole new look. Angela Wolf embroiders fabric to create a gown for the red carpet. Joanne Banko shows how to join lace, ribbon and fabric with the edge joining foot to get a designer look.

programme.title: Unconventional Art
programme.desc: Artists are known for taking an unconventional approach to their art – often introducing "non art" supplies to their work. First we look at stamped metal for inventive beads. Then Candie Cooper throws a curve and uses cookie tins for her project. Next Kate Richbourg throws out the loom for a lalique bracelet that is loom free. We'll finish up with artist Tammy Honaman as she manipulates right angle weave to turn it into shapes and beads.

programme.title: Mini Books
programme.desc: Good things come in small packages. Create a mini book from a 3D kaleidoscope with Joe Rotella, a mini journal with Jenny Barnett Rohrs, and 3D sculptured surface for your journal with Kim Hupke. All today on Scrapbook Soup.

programme.title: Episode 6: Living Creatures
programme.desc: Living creatures are all around us in nature. Host Julie Fei Fan Balzer begins with paper beetles; a fun and easy project drawing project. Then Cheryl Holz has a dragonfly portrait made with transparent overlays. Next Cat Kerr has a wall hanging made from an embroidery hoop featuring pigs. We finish with a nature inspired doodling meditation from Tori Weyers.

programme.title: Occasional Table
programme.desc: George Vondriska shows you how to make an occasional table to provide a convenient place for drinks, TV remotes, or a decorative lamp. He demonstrates the unique process of ebonizing, an alternative to stain used to give wood a rich, dark finish. With attractive tapered legs and a ceramic tabletop, this table is a great project to advance your woodworking skills.

programme.title: Classic Machine Attachments
programme.desc: Today's experts provide a new perspective on machine attachments. You can do so many techniques faster and easier when you choose the right accessory. Cookie Gaynor is first with an updated take on circles using a circle attachment and decorative stitches. Then, Angela Wolf's Little Black Dress lesson is hemming the vent on your dress. Finally, Clare Rowley shares her expertise on using sewing feet for easy ways to attach, trim, pearls, and sequins for an updated basic tee shirt.

programme.desc: Forget wool and alpaca fiber; upcycled socks and grocery bags are where it's at! Tune in to find out how to turn any tubular (and cuttable) material into knittable yarn.

programme.title: Stacked Increases + FOX PAWS Knitting Pattern
programme.desc: Having trouble with your Fox Paws scarf? Well, you're not the only one! Luckily, designer Xandy is here to share her tips and tricks for navigating her famously intricate pattern.

programme.title: Lettering
programme.desc: Today we take a very personal approach using our names and monograms. Our first projects are monogram ornaments made from air dry clay. Then make initial letter necklaces for you and your friends. Today's art journal technique is lettering -- learn some tips for simple calligraphy. Finally make an initial bulletin board covered with initials and doodle art.

programme.title: Me!
programme.desc: Let's turn toward ourselves for creative ideas. When she makes a lighted mirror, Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes you a star. Katie Hacker makes personal paper dolls and Franz Spohn draws a 3D self-portrait. Jenny celebrates Thanksgiving with Pilgrim-style table decorations.

programme.title: Wire It
programme.desc: Wire wrapping is one of our all time favorite techniques; keep it fresh with these updates on tried and true techniques. Make a layered pendant necklace, learn how to wire wrap bangle bracelets using sliders with Barb Switzer, last, make earrings with Patti Bullard. Wire it, wear it and love it.

programme.title: Shape Up
programme.desc: Bend it, twist it, shape it, wear it. Jewelry designer Sandra Lupo warms up by bending and shaping sheet metal with a tool she invented. Then, she enhances the designs with patterns, texture and color. Host and designer Katie Hacker make a quick and easy charm bracelet to cool down.

programme.title: Episode 5: Time
programme.desc: Let's liven things up! Joe Rotella makes a delightful owl clock. Cheryl Boglioli saves time as she creates colorful backgrounds for journals and scrapbooks. May Flaum has a great tip for adding interest to her pages. Christine Drumheller stays on schedule with a daily planner personalized with stickers and laminated pages.

programme.title: Episode 1: Fresh Looks
programme.desc: Get out your rose-colored glasses, or whatever props you need to take a fresh look at your art. Host Julie Fei Fan Balzer starts the show with a faux shibori dyeing demonstration. Then, our tool guy, Joe Rotella creates unique frames using small strips of wood for a rustic or metallic look. Finally, Tori Weyers returns this season for more artistic inspiration. Every other week she has a lesson on a new way of looking at an aspect of art through your sketchbook. Today it's all about words. Explore interesting textures and shapes through writing and letters.

programme.title: Braided Star Quilt
programme.desc: On the season finale of Season 6 of the Midnight Quilt Show, follow along as Angela shares her clever take on a braided quilt pattern she created herself!

programme.title: Modern X
programme.desc: In the Season 5 finale of The Midnight Quilt show, Angela is creating a modern quilt of her own design that involves a 36-patch block!

programme.title: Bonus: Quilters' Cutting Hacks
programme.desc: Great cuts make for more accurate quilts, and Angela is here to share some tips and tricks for quick and precise fabric cutting. Plus, she shares the best ruler sizes to have on hand.

programme.title: Z Is for Zoo
programme.desc: CAUTION: Baby quilts are a total gateway drug! Just ask Angela: she's working this cute little number up for her newborn nephew. (Think you can stop at one? Don't say we didn't warn you!)

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: National Sewing Circle presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to quilt step by step with National Quilting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Cook & Create
programme.desc: Welcome to CraftsyTV's Cook & Create, where delectable delights meet crafty creators.

programme.title: Artist's Academy presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Welcome to Artists's Academy where we are dedicated to making you a better artist. We believe everyone has an artist within, waiting to be unleashed. Our mission is to be your ultimate resource for visual art education using tutorials covering everything from fundamental techniques to advanced concepts in painting and drawing.

programme.title: Dresser Essentials
programme.desc: Making a dresser is a milestone project for many woodworkers. George Vondriska shares some essential skills that you'll need to craft a quality dresser that blends form and function. He'll dive into dimensions, construction, materials, drawers, and more. Then, follow along with his in-depth demonstration as he cuts and assembles the pieces of his dresser.

programme.title: Creative Crochet Corner presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Creative Crochet Corner is an online video streaming service all about learning how to crochet! Whether you're a new to crochet just learning the basics or an experienced crocheter looking for a challenge, Creative Crochet Corner is here to help. We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.

programme.title: Strips
programme.desc: Curved or straight, pieces define the design. Modern quilter Jen Carlton-Bailly uses templates to create contemporary curves. Fiber artist Shelly Gilliland joins Heather Grant with ideas for a quilting service day. Textile artist Chawne Kimber's colorful designs emerge as she pieces and sews a log cabin design with very small strips.

programme.title: DIY Quilted Zipper Pouch
programme.desc: Welcome to the second episode of the Holiday Gift-Along! Your hostess with the mostest (thread), Angela Walters, is back with another gift-worthy project idea: a basic quilted zipper bag with boxed corners. Don't worry, making zippers isn't as scary as you think!

programme.title: Bonus: Hide Your Quilting Mistakes
programme.desc: Wish you could make your quilting mistakes disappear? Angela is here to show you how. Well, at least how to hide them by using a matching thread color, echoing and repeating a mistake to make it look intentional.

programme.title: A Scrappy Stash-Buster Quilt Pattern
programme.desc: Do you experience stash-guilt? Well, Angela's got the cure with this scrappy stash-busting pattern.

programme.title: Surface Embellishment
programme.desc: Stitching designs or patterns on the surface of your fabric can be the perfect embellishment. Joanne Banko demonstrates machine embroidery on a kimono style dress. Then, Rebecca Kemp Brent explores visible mending - stitching that is meant to be seen and provides a decorative accent.

programme.title: Beading with Friends
programme.desc: It's fun to bead with friends. With a color palette for inspiration, Erin Prais-Hintz spills her beading secrets as she and Katie plan a beading party and give you more ideas for jewelry-making get-togethers. Katie uses vintage-style sliders to make glamorous chandelier earrings.

programme.title: Paint Your Way
programme.desc: Raid your art box for paint and gesso as we paint our way to fantastic layouts. Create Stencils with Jenny Barnett Rohrs, a layout from Ronda Palazzari with a technique for changing patterned paper into unique embellishments with gesso, and watercolors, and the fourth level (that's more than the third!) of dimension from Kim Hupke on a page entitled "my girl".

programme.title: Episode 3: Your Workspace
programme.desc: Shake up your workspace. Host Julie Fei Fan Balzer, known for her colorful aprons, shares how to make your own to reflect your mood and art style. Then, meet Kristin Gambaccini to create a simple but unique plant stand to bring a living plant into your studio. Finally, Micah Goguen shows how to make heirloom light catchers. Last is a color study -- the color purple.

programme.title: National Sewing Circle presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Strip City
programme.desc: Believe it or not, this quilt is only made of straight seams! Watch it "unfold" as Angela conquers the Strip City pattern with Boundless blues.

programme.title: Stars
programme.desc: Quilting just got better. Join Angela in her first episode as she stitches up her exclusive variable-star quilt design.

programme.title: Stash-Busting Quilted Table Runner!
programme.desc: This week, Angela's quilting a stash-busting table runner that's perfect for entertaining (plus, quick to whip up!), and sharing her favorite tips for throwing the perfect party!

programme.title: Flying Geese Quilt Redo!
programme.desc: Angela is kicking off Season 7 of the Midnight Quilt Show with a redemption story. She’s made this Thistle quilt pattern before with half-square triangles but thinks this flying-geese version will be much easier to quilt.

programme.title: Super Dad
programme.desc: "Xu Wei Hao (Thomas Ong) and Li Zheng Yi (Jeremy Chan) are neighbours who share one thing in common, both men are looked down upon by their wives and children. They receive a mysterious box of chocolates one day, thinking it was a mistake by the post office, Wei Hao and Zheng Yi each took a piece of the chocolate. Zheng Yi, once a cowardly policeman, suddenly possesses superb ability in solving a crime. While Wei Hao regains the respect of his daughter by saving her when she fell from a building. Chen Kai (Chen Han Wei), the ex-husband of Zheng Yi’s wife, was released from jail and tries to seek forgiveness. Seeing his sincerity in turning over a new leaf, Zheng Yi took him in. He accidentally took a piece of the chocolate and discovers its super power. The trio starts to rely on the chocolate every time they needed its super power to solve problems, making them the "Xu Wei Hao (Thomas Ong) and Li Zheng Yi (Jeremy Chan) are neighbours who share one thing in common, both men are looked down upon by their wives and children. They receive a mysterious box of chocolates one day, thinking it was a mistake by the post office, Wei Hao and Zheng Yi each took a piece of the chocolate. Zheng Yi, once a cowardly policeman, suddenly possesses superb ability in solving a crime. While Wei Hao regains the respect of his daughter by saving her when she fell from a building. Chen Kai (Chen Han Wei), the ex-husband of Zheng Yi’s wife, was released from jail and tries to seek forgiveness. Seeing his sincerity in turning over a new leaf, Zheng Yi took him in. He accidentally took a piece of the chocolate and discovers its super power. The trio starts to rely on the chocolate every time they needed its super power to solve problems, making them the Super Dad in their children’s eyes. One day, the three fathers see their own children in danger, but there is only one piece of chocolate left. Will they fight to see who gets the last piece of chocolate or will they count on their own will to save their children?" in their children’s eyes. One day, the three fathers see their own children in danger, but there is only one piece of chocolate left. Will they fight to see who gets the last piece of chocolate or will they count on their own will to save their children?"

programme.title: SuperDad
programme.desc: "Xu Wei Hao (Thomas Ong) and Li Zheng Yi (Jeremy Chan) are neighbours who share one thing in common, both men are looked down upon by their wives and children. They receive a mysterious box of chocolates one day, thinking it was a mistake by the post office, Wei Hao and Zheng Yi each took a piece of the chocolate. Zheng Yi, once a cowardly policeman, suddenly possesses superb ability in solving a crime. While Wei Hao regains the respect of his daughter by saving her when she fell from a building. Chen Kai (Chen Han Wei), the ex-husband of Zheng Yi’s wife, was released from jail and tries to seek forgiveness. Seeing his sincerity in turning over a new leaf, Zheng Yi took him in. He accidentally took a piece of the chocolate and discovers its super power. The trio starts to rely on the chocolate every time they needed its super power to solve problems, making them the Super Dad in their children’s eyes. One day, the three fathers see their own children in danger, but there is only one piece of chocolate left. Will they fight to see who gets the last piece of chocolate or will they count on their own will to save their children?"

programme.title: Soul Detective
programme.desc: "An officer from the underworld joins forces with a policeman to track down evil spirits that have escaped to the mortal realm. Together, they explore the good and evil of human nature. This drama combines traditional and modern elements to bring a new fantasy experience to the audience. "

programme.title: Love At First Bite
programme.desc: Xi Yue, a staunch believer of fate, meets the rational and cold Martius whom she believes bring her bad luck. Unknown to her, Martius has been quietly helping Xi Yue achieve her culinary dream.

programme.title: Incredible Tales Sr 7
programme.desc: Hosted by Utt, Incredible Tales returns for Season 7, featuring more ghoulish stories of paranormal encounters from Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand and Philippines. Incredible Tales is all about ghost stories told through generations, crossing boundaries of culture and language. Stories that generate intrigue, fascination, and fear.

programme.title: 20 Days
programme.desc: Everyone views singlehood differently. For Edrick ( Elvin Ng) , it is the pain of not being able to find the right girl. As for his brother, Wesley (Nat Ho) , it signifies a life of freedom. Yet for Edrick’s best friend Jess (Felicia Chin), she simply blames her old-fashioned mother, who forced her to focus on her studies instead.

programme.title: Crave
programme.desc: Warning: do not watch Crave on an empty stomach. Because we’ll have you craving a creamy scoop of ice cream bedded on a crispy waffle. Or really, really needing to crunch into juicy fried chicken right now. Hosted by Charlotte Mei, the runner-up of Eat List Star, Crave finds out what gets celebrities salivating – roti prata, roast meats, sushi, satay, salted egg ice cream, buah keluak, and even an English-style big breakfast! Our celebrities’ cravings know no bounds, and anything from local to Japanese to Mediterranean fare is fair game – as long as they crave it. And there’s a little special by Charlotte. On every show, she will cook a dish – guaranteed to make you crave for it!

programme.title: Its In Our Nature
programme.desc: A million wildlife species are facing the threat of extinction. But why does this matter to a tiny city state like Singapore? What do we stand to lose if our wildlife go extinct? Host Lam Shushan comes face to face with some of the rarest creatures in the world and meets the tenacious frontliners who are racing to save our native wildlife from extinction.

programme.title: Crave
programme.desc: Warning: do not watch Crave on an empty stomach. Because we’ll have you craving a creamy scoop of ice cream bedded on a crispy waffle. Or really, really needing to crunch into juicy fried chicken right now. Hosted by Charlotte Mei, the runner-up of Eat List Star, Crave finds out what gets celebrities salivating – roti prata, roast meats, sushi, satay, salted egg ice cream, buah keluak, and even an English-style big breakfast! Our celebrities’ cravings know no bounds, and anything from local to Japanese to Mediterranean fare is fair game – as long as they crave it. And there’s a little special by Charlotte. On every show, she will cook a dish – guaranteed to make you crave for it!

programme.title: Its In Our Nature
programme.desc: A million wildlife species are facing the threat of extinction. But why does this matter to a tiny city state like Singapore? What do we stand to lose if our wildlife go extinct? Host Lam Shushan comes face to face with some of the rarest creatures in the world and meets the tenacious frontliners who are racing to save our native wildlife from extinction.

programme.title: Vettai
programme.desc: "They are part of a special task force assembled to tackle cases pertaining to the Indian community and Indian immigrants. The unit is not widely publicized and their work is kept under wraps. Spearheaded by Chief Dayanidhi, the team consists of three teams and an assigned criminologist. Together they try to tackle cold blooded murders, kidnaps and sexual crimes. But as their professional and personal lives collide, the team is headed towards a perilous outcome. Lives will be lost and bonds will be broken. The pledge that they made to uphold justice and peace in the country that they love will be put to the test. How will they survive? Where does it all lead to? Who is the villain and who is the hero?"

Together they try to tackle cold blooded murders, kidnaps and sexual crimes. But as their professional and personal lives collide, the team is headed towards a perilous outcome. Lives will be lost and bonds will be broken. The pledge that they made to uphold justice and peace in the country that they love will be put to the test. How will they survive? Where does it all lead to? Who is the villain and who is the hero?"

programme.title: Burning Pain
programme.desc: After his wife becomes sick and unable to move properly, Michael takes on the extra responsibility of caring for her. Is he doing this out of the goodness of his heart or is there something nefarious going on behind close doors?

programme.title: My Burden
programme.desc: The demise of a couple comes after their daughter gets kidnapped by a sex trafficking ring. They both have different ideas on what to do to bring her home successfully.

programme.title: In Bloom - Aféfé
programme.desc: A collection of 5 short films addressing gender equality issues such as period poverty, child marriage, gender-based violence, HIV and economic empowerment. Fifth Short: "Aféfé," written and directed by Dolapo 'LowlaDee' Adeleke (Nigeria). When her elderly and ailing mother-in-law moves in unexpectedly, life for an impassioned local beautician takes a frightening turn.

programme.title: Pains Of Rhoda
programme.desc: A woman whose husband is sterile goes through a lot of emotional ups and downs as she tries to console him during their trying time but, his trust issues causes more problems instead.

programme.title: The Hangout S5 ep13
programme.desc: The Hangout returns for its fifth season with a group of opinionated, social media-savvy millennials who debate controversial topics on love, sex, friendship, and more.

programme.title: Car Heist
programme.desc: Two police recruits witness the murder of a foreigner and decide to steal the million-dollar cash left in the victim's car, but their plan keeps on failing.

programme.title: Sisi Eko - Ep12
programme.desc: Eko is beautiful and knows it, so it is no surprise that she gets most of the male attention. Finding Mr Right, however, is proving to be complicated, as Mr Right must meet her '6-Cardinal Rules'. The romantic comedy series touches on important issues such as mental health, anxiety, and self-doubt.

programme.title: Sisi Eko - Ep 13
programme.desc: Eko is beautiful and knows it, so it is no surprise that she gets most of the male attention. Finding Mr Right, however, is proving to be complicated, as Mr Right must meet her '6-Cardinal Rules'. The romantic comedy series touches on important issues such as mental health, anxiety, and self-doubt.

programme.title: Make A Move
programme.desc: An ex-convict gets pulled back into her old ways when she takes on a job that leads to the murder of an innocent man. Things get further complicated when she finds herself involved with his son who is out seeking revenge.

programme.title: The Drive
programme.desc: Becky and Chude are excited for their growing family, not realising just how much their unsavoury lifestyle will impact them.

programme.title: The Hangout S5 Ep4
programme.desc: The Hangout returns for its fifth season with a group of opinionated, social media-savvy millennials who debate controversial topics on love, sex, friendship, and more.

programme.title: Imperfection
programme.desc: A man struggles to deal with a nagging wife while she also finds difficulty keeping up with his nonchalance. But a balance must be struck if they'll make marriage a success.

programme.title: Sade
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. A teenage girl fails to return home after a day of hawking oranges and the local hoodlums are the first suspects for her disappearance, however the investigation shows that all is not as it seems.

programme.title: AMC Music Lounge S7 - Maio
programme.desc: AMC Music Lounge returns for its seventh season bringing you some new interviews, new live performances, fun musical games, and many more from legendary and emerging artistes.

programme.title: Wrongfully Hers
programme.desc: Hijinks follows after Perpetual, pretending to be a sophisticated socialite, befriends Gina who has fallen in love with Esa, not realising he is Perpetual's unappreciated boyfriend.

programme.title: Check-Mate
programme.desc: Jada, suspicious about her husband's reason for always being tired, decides to hire an escort to test his fidelity. Things don't go according to plan, and she puts their relationship into jeopardy.

programme.title: Grim
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Charles loses his job shortly after settling down with his wife, Abigail. Things become pretty difficult for the family as Abigail is a fresh graduate and yet to secure a job, as a result, she cannot not help financially. They decide to hold off on having children, however, Abigail gets pregnant and they cannot agree on how to handle it. The situations not helped by the unexpected arrival of Charles' mother, Evelyn.

programme.title: Grim
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Charles loses his job shortly after settling down with his wife, Abigail. programme.title: Hunt
programme.desc: The CEO of a trucking company is acquitted during a high profile human trafficking case but when he wants to go legitimate, his shady business partner is determined to do everything in his power to keep their arrangement going.

programme.title: 31 Days
programme.desc: Two young corpers find themselves in the unknown when they are assigned to a small village for their youth service and try to teach new ways of doing things that defy the village's traditions.

programme.title: AMC Red Carpet - Banke Naya The Homecoming
programme.desc: AMC Red Carpet moments brings you exclusive red carpet interviews with Nollywood stars at the premieres of top Nollywood movies and other industry events such as award ceremonies.

programme.title: Cast On A Stone
programme.desc: Lisa’s life becomes a life lesson for an irresponsible father, after her criminal past catches up with her when her ex-boyfriend and current husband cross paths.

programme.title: Lurk
programme.desc: A woman dedicated to her work is unaware that she has made enemies who would stop at nothing to see her dead.

programme.title: The Missing Package
programme.desc: In The Missing Package, Detective Lazarus is almost done for the day when an unassuming middle-aged man walks in and reports a package he is expecting missing, but more importantly is the carrier who seems to have disappeared into thin air. This sets Detective Lazarus on a wild goose chase to find what appears to be a package determined not to be found and a carrier who appears to no longer exist.

programme.title: Scars Ep 23
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 24
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: AMC Red Carpet - Banke Naya The Homecoming
programme.desc: AMC Red Carpet moments brings you exclusive red carpet interviews with Nollywood stars at the premieres of top Nollywood movies and other industry events such as award ceremonies.

programme.title: Aces Of Hurt
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Displeased with his son's choice of a wife, a deadbeat father is out to show his son’s fiancée hell over the course of the weekend, but this fire he is stoking will uncover a truth that might be the bane of the both of them.

programme.title: Frenemy
programme.desc: In the process of divorcing her husband, Peggy moves out of the house to start a new life and, hopefully, to forget all about the opposite gender, but life has other plans for her.

programme.title: Shaffy's Sister
programme.desc: Shaffy’s sister, Daisy, struggles to interact with her family and find her place in society after spending years in prison.

programme.title: The Keeper
programme.desc: Armed robbers strike a young man desperate not to do away with his boss’ 50,000 dollars—what he considers a ticket to his elusive good side.

programme.title: Pressured
programme.desc: A woman is regarded as a spinster after a series of failed romances and feeling pressure from all around her to settle down with the next man that comes along.

programme.title: Hell Mary
programme.desc: Mary, set to takeover her mother’s fashion empire, is used to getting her way. Taking an interest in Andre, the chief photographer, she decides to start work in her mother’s company. She becomes obsessed with him and does everything in her power to get his attention. Things take a diabolical turn when Andre constantly rebuffs her advances.

programme.title: The Greeks Had a Word for Them-1932
programme.desc: In this sophisticated comedy Jazz Age comedy, a trio of money-hungry women all have sugar daddies who keep them in the lap of luxury, even as they drive the men crazy. Each woman represents a different personality type, from sensitive, to kind-hearted, to difficult and untrustworthy. The twenties come roaring back with immorality and in-fighting

programme.title: The Gorilla 1939
programme.desc: When a wealthy man is threatened by a killer known as The Gorilla, he hires the Ritz Brothers to investigate. A real escaped gorilla shows up at the mansion just as the investigators arrive.

programme.title: The Fourth Alarm-1926
programme.desc: The gang organizes their own junior fire department by converting an old barn into a firehouse. Later, going to a real fire proved difficult for them especially Farina who couldn't quite handle his heavily pressured fire hose.

programme.title: Smart Alecks-1942
programme.desc: Danny comes into money for capturing an elusive criminal - money which Mugs insists he split equally with the gang while gangsters want to split open Danny.

programme.title: Tillie's Punctured Romance- 1914
programme.desc: A con man from the city dupes a wealthy country girl into marriage.

programme.title: College - 1927
programme.desc: Ronald's high-school valedictory address praises books and condemns sports. His girlfriend Mary condemns his attitude. Fearing to lose her to rival Jeff, he decides to go to college and pay more attentions to sports.

programme.title: Caught in a Cabaret 1914
programme.desc: Charlie is a clumsy waiter in a cheap cabaret and must endure the strict orders from his boss. He meets a pretty girl in the park and pretends to be a fancy ambassador but must contend with the jealousy of her fiancé.

programme.title: The Lucy Show; Season 5; Episode 17; Main Street U.S.A.
programme.desc: Mr. Mooney and Lucy travel to a quaint small town to loan the mayor money to build a highway right down Main Street. When they arrive, they are greeted with intense opposition and Lucy decides to join the anti-highway townspeople fight the new road.

programme.title: The Front Page 1931
programme.desc: A crusading newspaper editor tricks his retiring star reporter into covering one last case.

programme.title: The 'High Sign'-1921
programme.desc: A drifter at an amusement park finds himself both the bodyguard and hit man of a man targeted by a criminal gang.

programme.title: The Boat by Buster Keaton 1921
programme.desc: Buster and his family go on a voyage on his homemade boat that proves to be one disaster after another

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Season 3; Episode 20; Rafe Holster Sings
programme.desc: When image-conscious Mayor Stoner objects to a golden-voiced--but wardrobe-challenged--farmer chosen to represent Mayberry in the upcoming musicale, Andy must find a way to appease all sides.

programme.title: Neath Brooklyn Bridge-1942
programme.desc: The East Side Kids uncover the body of a murder victim, but must protect the innocent girl accused of the crime

programme.title: Safety Last!1923
programme.desc: A boy leaves his small country town and heads to the big city to get a job. As soon as he makes it big his sweetheart will join him and marry him. His enthusiasm to get ahead leads to some interesting adventures.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show 1962: Season 2; Episode 5; Hustling the Hustler
programme.desc: Rob doesn't know what he's in for when he invites Buddy's charming, pool hustling brother Blackie over for dinner and a friendly game of billiards.

programme.title: Africa Screams 1949
programme.desc: Two booksellers search for diamonds in Africa, along the way meeting a visually-impaired gunner, a hungry lion, and a tribe of cannibals.

programme.title: Cops 1922
programme.desc: A series of mishaps manages to make a young man get chased by a big city's entire police force

programme.title: Half Shot at Sunrise1930
programme.desc: The stage stars Wheeler and Woolsey play two soldiers who go absent without leave in Paris, during World War I.

programme.title: Recreation-1914
programme.desc: Charlie is walking in the park. A girl leaves a seaman on one bench and joins Charlie on another. The seaman wakes up. He and Charlie stage a brick fight. Policemen get hit and arrest both men. During an ensuing fight on the dock the policemen, the seaman, Charlie and the girl wind up in the water

programme.title: Jack and the Beanstalk-1952
programme.desc: Abbott & Costello's version of the famous fairy tale, about a young boy who trades the family cow for magic beans.

programme.title: The Bashful Bachelor-1942
programme.desc: Lum Edwards is annoyed with his partner in Pine Ridge's Jot-'em-Down general store, Abner Peabody, because Abner has swapped their delivery car for a racehorse. Lum is also too timid to propose to Geraldine, so he involves Abner in a "rescue" effort which nearly gets both of them killed. They try again, and this time Geraldine is impressed. Lum writes a proposal note, but Abner, by mistake, delivers it to the Widder Abernathy, who has been ready to remarry for years. This puts Lum in a peck of trouble until the sheriff appears with the Widder's long-gone and hiding husband

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men (1943)
programme.desc: The Range Busters set out to capture a gang of fugitives hiding in the hills, uncovering a scheme of robbery and deception as they pursue the outlaws and work to restore justice to the territory.

programme.title: Law of the Lash
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal sets out to capture a notorious outlaw gang, confronting corruption and danger as he fights to bring justice to the frontier

programme.title: Lost Ranch 1937
programme.desc: A cowboy sets out to uncover the mystery behind a missing ranch and its vanished owners, facing danger as he confronts those determined to keep the truth hidden

programme.title: Come On, Cowboys (1937)
programme.desc: When the circus owner friend of the Mesquiteers is framed for counterfeiting by his unscrupulous partner, the trio pledges to maintain his interests and care for his young daughter

programme.title: Buffalo Bill, Jr S1E26 Fugitive from Injustice.
programme.desc: Young Papito Gonzales is on the run from a man who claims that the mare and colt the boy has are his. Papito soon comes to Wileyville while on the run and gets into trouble with some men who steal his mare. Bill and Calamity set out to help the boy reclaim his horses and clear a matter with the man who is looking for him

programme.title: Clipped Wings 1936.
programme.desc: Ever since he was a boy, Mickey wanted to fly planes like his big brother, Jerry, who was shot down during a mission in World War I. Unfortunately, Mickey is booted from flight school

programme.title: Lust To Kill 1958
programme.desc: A hardened gunslinger is drawn into a deadly conflict when vengeance and greed collide, forcing him to confront ruthless enemies in a violent struggle for survival

programme.title: Northwest Passage S1E16 The Counterfeiters
programme.desc: Major Rogers investigates a counterfeiting operation threatening the frontier economy, leading his Rangers on a dangerous mission to track down those responsible

programme.title: Law of the West
programme.desc: A lawman returns to a troubled frontier town to confront a ruthless gang, risking his life to restore justice and protect innocent settlers

programme.title: Buffalo Bill, Jr S1E19 Redskin Gap.
programme.desc: Butch Cassidy and the Wild Bunch rob a stagecoach carrying a mine’s payroll. Butch knocks out the marshal guarding the money and exchanges identities with the unconscious lawman. While leafing through a stack of wanted posters, Bill discovers the truth and attempts to recover the loot with the help of his sister, Calamity and an old sea‑dog called Barnacle Barney.

programme.title: Born to the Saddle (1952
programme.desc: When a young man agrees to race a wonderful quarter horse, a crooked, wife abusing, gambler has plans to sabotage the contest

programme.title: Last Raid at Cabin Creek
programme.desc: A group of outlaws plots one final raid on a remote mining town, but internal conflicts and unexpected resistance threaten to unravel their plan.

programme.title: Range Busters Arizona Stage Coach 1942
